---
name: Framework Feedback
about: Suggest improvements to the ACIF framework content, standards, or verification process
title: '[FRAMEWORK] '
labels: framework
assignees: ''
---

## Which section of the framework does this relate to?
- [ ] Section 1: Scope and Definitions
- [ ] Section 2: Core Principles
- [ ] Section 3: Content Risk Classification
- [ ] Section 4: Age-Appropriateness Framework
- [ ] Section 5: Hallucination Detection Protocol
- [ ] Section 6: Five-Gate Verification Pipeline
- [ ] Section 7: Data Privacy and Student Protection
- [ ] Section 8: Governance, Roles and Responsibilities
- [ ] Section 9: Standards Alignment
- [ ] Section 10: Implementation Guide
- [ ] Other: ___

## What is your feedback?
Describe your suggestion, concern, or proposed change clearly.

## What is the rationale?
Why is this change important? What problem does it solve or what does it improve?

## Your context
- [ ] I am a teacher/educator
- [ ] I am a school administrator
- [ ] I am an EdTech developer
- [ ] I am a policymaker
- [ ] Other: ___

## Country/Region (if relevant)
This helps us understand whether the feedback is specific to a national context.
